about dyar 

Diyar Real Estate, a subsidiary of the Armed Forces, is a major player in the real estate world, enjoying unparalleled trust and credibility in Egypt. This has helped the company deliver a greater number of projects and accomplishments, with the primary goal of developing the real estate market in Egypt and introducing new projects that serve citizens and contribute to providing a stable life and world-class services for your family's comfort.
--------

ERE is committed to helping clients find or sell their properties in New Cairo. We specialize in properties located in upscale residential compounds such as Cairo Festival City, Mivida, Emaar, Mountain View, Hyde Park, Katameya Dunes, and many more. With a proven track record and commitment to excellence spanning over 20 years, we guarantee our clients a truly memorable experience.

title.en: Villa in Diyar Al-Mukhabarat, 5 bedrooms, for rent
title.ar: Villa in Diyar Al-Mukhabarat, 5 bedrooms, for rent

description.en:
For Rent: A Distinctive Villa in Diyar Al-Mukhabarat

A Model C villa in a prime sea-facing location within one of the most prestigious residential compounds.

Villa Features:

Land Area: 750 sq m

Built-up Area: 650 sq m

Basement, Ground Floor, First Floor, and Roof

A detached villa with a practical design and spacious layout

Sea-facing, providing excellent natural light and ventilation

High level of privacy

Compound Features:

A sophisticated and well-organized compound

24-hour security and surveillance

Wide streets and green spaces

A tranquil environment suitable for family living

Location Advantages:

Inside Diyar Al-Mukhabarat

Close to main roads

Easy access to vital areas

Compound Services:

Security and surveillance

Regular maintenance

Integrated management

Green spaces

Rent: 90,000 EGP per month

description.en:
Villa for rent in Narges Villas, New Cairo
Prime location with garden view and open front view.
Fully equipped with air conditioners and heaters.
Land area 700 sqm.
The villa consists of
Basement with swimming pool
Ground floor
First floor
Second repeated floor
Roof
Total rooms 18
Total bathrooms 16
Each floor apartment includes
3 bedrooms including 1 master bedroom
3 bathrooms
Living room
Large kitchen
Reception 4 pieces
Rent
250,000 EGP per month
Residential use only
Ad Code
طرف41097
Contact
01044251012
H
About MSKM:
MSKM is a real estate consultancy based in Egypt, that aims to provide comprehensive services for your real estate needs. If you are willing to invest or are interested in buying a residential or a commercial property, we are here to help transform your plans into reality.
MSKM aims to provide our customers with almost all the needs you would need, Residential or Commercial. East Wing offers offices and Retails available in nearly every district in Egypt like New Cairo, Heliopolis, Nasr City, 6th of October, Zayed, New Zayed, North Coast, and New Capital.

description.en:
villa Model b for Rent in Diyar Al Mokhabarat
3 bedrooms, 2 living rooms, and a nanny room
5 bathrooms
Land area 680 m2
Building area 850 m2
------------------------------------------
About Diyar Compound:
----
The compound is located just minutes away from major facilities and vital locations, such as 90th Street, one of the most popular areas in the Fifth Settlement, which offers many services, including Downtown Mall, Cairo Festival Mall, and Concord Plaza Mall.
Diyar Real Estate was able to choose a distinct strategic location for Diyar Al Mokhabarat Compound in the heart of the Fifth Settlement, near 90th Street. Therefore, it is close to all major roads and axes that connect the compound to many of the neighboring new cities, such as Shorouk City, Obour City, Badr City, and the New Administrative Capital.

Properties for rent in The 5th Settlement
Apartments for rent in The 5th Settlement
Duplexes for rent in The 5th Settlement
4 bedroom Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
Furnished Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
Townhouses for rent in The 5th Settlement
Twin Houses for rent in The 5th Settlement
5 bedroom Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
3 bedroom Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
6 bedroom Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
7 bedroom Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
2 bedroom Villas for rent in The 5th Settlement
--------------------------------------
ERE is committed to helping clients find or sell their properties in New Cairo. We specialize in properties in upscale residential compounds such as Cairo Festival City, Mivida, Emaar, Mountain View, Hyde Park, Katameya Dunes, and many more. With over 20 years of proven track record and commitment to excellence, we ensure a seamless real estate experience. We offer expert guidance to make buying and selling easier in some of Cairo's most sought-after locations.

title.en: Prime villa available for rent in Al Narges Villa
title.ar: Prime villa available for rent in Al Narges Villa

description.en:
Villa for Rent – Residential Only

Prime villa available for rent in the prestigious Al Narges Villas area, located in New Cairo. The villa enjoys a garden view and a north-facing façade, providing excellent natural light and ventilation.

Property Details:

Land Area: 700 sqm

Total Rooms: 18

Total Bathrooms: 16

Each Floor Area: 300 sqm

Villa Layout:

Basement: Includes a swimming pool

Ground Floor

First Floor

Second Floor (Typical Floor)

Roof Floor

Roof Features:

3 Bedrooms (including 1 Master Bedroom)

3 Bathrooms

Living Area

Large Kitchen

Reception (4 pieces)

Additional Features:

Air conditioners installed

Water heaters installed

Garden view

North-facing façade

 Located in Al Narges Villas – Fifth Settlement
Usage: Residential Only
 Asking Price: 250,000 EGP per month for the entire villa
